Coin of Ages — Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 28, 2026

Overview

Coin of Ages ("the App") is a casual idle clicker game. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.

Data We Collect

Game progress data: Your coin count, upgrade levels, era progress, relics, and settings are stored locally on your device. This data never leaves your device and is not transmitted to any server.

Anonymous analytics: We collect a single anonymous event to understand player progress. When a player reaches the end of the current content (Era 7), a one-time anonymous event is sent to Google Analytics 4. This event contains only a randomly generated install identifier — no personal information is ever included.

No personal data: We do not collect your name, email address, phone number, location, or any other personally identifiable information.

Advertising

The App may offer optional rewarded ads provided by Google AdMob. These ads are entirely opt-in — they will only play if you choose to watch one in exchange for an in-game reward. We will never show interstitial or pop-up ads that interrupt gameplay without your consent.

Google AdMob may collect anonymous device identifiers and usage data to serve relevant ads. Please refer to their privacy policy for more information:

  • Google AdMob / Google Privacy Policy

Children's Privacy

The App does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. The App is rated for all ages and contains no user-generated content or social features.

Data Storage

All game progress is stored locally on your device. We do not operate any servers that store your personal data. Uninstalling the App will delete all locally stored data.

Third-Party Services

The App uses the following third-party services:

  • Google Analytics 4 (anonymous progress analytics)
  • Google AdMob (optional rewarded advertising)
  • Google Play Services (app distribution)

Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by updating the "Last updated" date above.

Contact

If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at: info@thebillymangames.com
